author: y4rr
content: Result: Added GPU clamp PTX kernel (clamp_kernel with min/max params), gpu_clamp function, GpuBackend::clamp_f32 trait method, backend_impl override, and GPU dispatch in clamp() forward. This unblocked Huber/SmoothL1 loss backward refactoring — both now use GPU-dispatched sub+clamp+mul+div instead of CPU roundtrips. The remaining unary_map callers (special.rs functions, ops/elementwise fast_* fallbacks) are CPU-only but only hit when the differentiable function's GPU path isn't available.
